device_name: ACUSON Sequoia Diagnostic Ultrasound System, ACUSON Sequoia Select Diagnostic Ultrasound System, ACUSON Origin Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The ACUSON Sequoia and Sequoia Select ultrasound imaging systems are intended to provide images of, or signals from, inside the body by an appropriately trained healthcare professional in a clinical s
intended_use_full: The ACUSON Sequoia and Sequoia Select ultrasound imaging systems are intended to provide images of, or signals from, inside the body by an appropriately trained healthcare professional in a clinical setting for the following applications: Fetal, Abdominal, Pediatric, Neonatal Cephalic, Small Parts, OB/GYN (useful for visualization of the ovaries, follicles, uterus and other pelvic structures), Cardiac, Pelvic, Vascular, Adult Cephalic, Musculoskeletal and Peripheral Vascular applications.
target_condition: Multiple clinical applications including cardiac, abdominal, vascular, musculoskeletal, and obstetric/gynecologic conditions
ground_truth: For AI Assist: expert cardiac sonographers scored success (no/minor adjustment) vs. failure (major adjustment); For 2D HeartAI, 4D HeartAI, AI Measure: manual contouring and measurements by three examiners with mean reference standard established from three examiners, variability assessed by intraclass correlation (ICC) and Bland-Altman analysis
other_metrics: AI Assist: 99.3% overall success rate, ≥92% success for any placement location; 2D HeartAI: Pearson correlation ≥0.81, Bland-Altman bias <5.2, Normal BMI ≥0.84, Obese (BMI>25) ≥0.82; 4D HeartAI: Pearson correlation ≥0.87, Bland-Altman bias <13.3, Normal BMI ≥0.98, Obese (BMI>25) ≥0.81; AI Measure: 89.6% success rate, ≥88.1% across all modes
